claims.summary: Verify gemma-4_12b resolves to the intended Gemma profile while an unknown profile warns and defaults to Production.
Verify punctuation normalization is an intentional alias policy and does not silently accept unrelated unknown profiles.
Verify pressure above 0.20 prioritizes weighted medium around a gentle slope rather than falsely describing a heavy slope.
Generate a high-entropy high-pressure fallback response and check actual sentence-cap and texture-anchor adherence.
